projectDescription: A browser-based desktop operating system with a GUI mode, terminal emulator, draggable windows, and a suite of built-in apps — all running entirely in HTML/CSS/JavaScript.
keyFeatures: Bootloader UI to choose between GUI and Terminal mode
Draggable, resizable, minimizable, and maximizable windows styled with 7.css (Windows 7 aesthetic)
Grid-based desktop icon layout with automatic cell placement
Terminal emulator with curl (via libcurl.js/Wisp), neofetch, games, and Lumin SDK commands
Vanta.js animated globe background in Terminal mode
Blob-iframe app sandboxing for loading app HTML inside windows
Drag-and-drop .js file execution on the desktop
Built-in apps: Browser, Music, Calculator, Camera, Soundboard, Games, Map
Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+X to close the topmost window
Self-contained single-file builds (ossingle.html / singlefile.html) served from jsDelivr CDN
publicApiSurface: openWindow(id, htmlPath, title, fallbackUrl) — open or restore a window
minimizeWindow(id) — minimize a window by its DOM id
maximizeWindow(btn) — toggle maximize on the window containing the button
closeWindow(btn) — remove the window containing the button from the DOM
makeDraggable(wrapper) — attach drag behaviour to a .window-wrapper element
renderBlobIframe(container, htmlText) — render HTML string into a blob iframe
loadAppIntoWindow(win, htmlPath, fallbackUrl) — fetch and render an app into a window
findNextFreeCell() — return the next unoccupied grid cell {x, y}
window.Apps[] — global array for registering desktop applications
Terminal commands: help, time, echo, curl, ip, games, neofetch, gui, luminsdk
